data.title: Weekly report share buyback from April 13 to April 17, 2026
data.description: Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) has reported its recent share buyback activity in compliance with regulations. Between April 13, 2026, and April 17, 2026, the company purchased an undisclosed number of its own shares as part of its buyback program.

data.title: Target Announces 2026 Bullseye Builds, Investing in Community Spaces with Volunteerism and Design
data.description: In 2026, Target aims to complete the construction of 13 Bullseye Builds through its Community Program, with a significant investment of $1 million. These builds will be tailored to reflect the unique characteristics and needs of the local communities they serve, leveraging Target's design capabilities. The first of these projects are set to debut in May in Denver and Las Vegas. The initiative of Bullseye Builds was initially launched in 2024.

data.title: Xinghaoya Provides Free and Discreet Shipping on Expansive Selection of Exciting Products
data.description: Global consumers now have the opportunity to secure complimentary products with their personal purchases. Xinghaoya recently announced their initiative to provide free and inconspicuous delivery on all purchases, catering to customers worldwide. This service ensures a convenient and confidential shopping experience for all, regardless of their location, with no additional shipping fees.

data.title: Privacy concerns with stablecoins hindering their adoption by banks and fintechs. Four solutions in competition to address this.
data.description: Financial institutions and financial technology companies are hesitant to embrace stablecoin payments due to concerns over potential exposure of transaction data to competitors. To address this issue, four different privacy solutions are currently vying to provide a secure method for conducting transactions without compromising sensitive data. These initiatives aim to safeguard the privacy of users and ensure that businesses can operate without the risk of competitors accessing their transaction information.

data.title: Exco Technologies Limited Announces Second Quarter Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: Exco Technologies Limited (TSX – XTC) has announced that it will release its financial results for the second quarter ending March 31, 2026 after market close on April 29, 2026. A conference call to discuss the results is scheduled for April 30 at 10:00 a.m. To listen to the live audio webcast, visit www.excocorp.com or https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/7xw8y4gn shortly before the event. For those wishing to participate in the question-and-answer session, registration is available at https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BI84bf2962f01e44b2bd3d64bfdccb9375 to receive the dial-in details and unique PIN. Attendees are advised to join 10 minutes before the start of the event, although registration and dial-in are open throughout the call.

data.title: Max Stock Limited Announces General Meeting Results
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Caesarea, Israel, Max Stock Limited (TASE: MAXO) convened a shareholder meeting where all agenda items were approved by the necessary majorities. The key outcome included the reappointment of Ernst & Young Israel. This announcement signifies the continued support and confidence of shareholders in the company’s operations and future directions. The decisions made at this meeting are crucial for maintaining corporate governance and ensuring transparency within Max Stock Limited.

data.title: Chef Preston Nguyen Claims World Food Championships Crown at 2026 Final Table
data.description: A chef from Texas has won the prestigious title of the 13th World Food Champion, along with a grand prize of $100,000. The intense culinary competition concluded with a thrilling two-day finale in Bentonville, Arkansas. The World Food Championships (WFC) announced the champion after a season of rigorous contests.

data.title: エコーダイン、Trust Automationの4億9,000万ドル規模の米空軍向け対UASエンジニアリング契約でレーダー・システムに採用
data.description: In Kirkland, Washington, EchoShield announced that their EchoRadar has been selected as the primary radar system for Trust Automation's Small Unmanned Aircraft Defense System (SUADS) for the US Air Force. This selection is part of a $490 million IDIQ contract awarded in August 2025. The SUADS platforms include RD-SUADS, FS-SUADS, and EX-SUADS, all compliant with the Sensor Open Systems Architecture (SOSA) standard. The EchoShield radar is the first fully integrated SOSA solution for these platforms. The RD-SUADS platform conforms to standard pallet dimensions and offers advanced UAS defense capabilities.

data.title: New Poll: 2 in 3 Voters Prefer Congressional Candidates Who Support Vaccine Access – Partnership to Fight Infectious Disease
data.description: A recent national poll conducted from April 1-3, 2026, by Echelon Insights among 1,012 likely voters in the U.S. revealed that American voters highly trust independent doctors and scientists regarding vaccines. The majority of voters prefer candidates who support easy access to vaccines and advocate for immunization recommendations that are free from political influence. This survey comes at a crucial time as shifts in vaccine policies and federal guidelines are gaining significant attention nationwide. These results underscore the importance and trust placed in healthcare professionals and the necessity for non-politicized vaccine recommendations.

data.title: ATRI President Rebecca Brewster Announces Retirement
data.description: Rebecca Brewster, President of ATRI, revealed plans for her retirement in early 2027 after 34 years with the organization, 25 of which were spent as president and COO. Throughout her leadership, notable growth and success were achieved at ATRI.

data.title: Beamr Validates ML-Safe Compression for dSPACE Data Logging
data.description: At the upcoming dSPACE User Conference in Novi, Michigan on April 21-22, Beamr will showcase a significant achievement in file size reduction. Specifically, they managed to deliver a remarkable 31% decrease in file sizes when compared to standard encodes on footage sourced from dSPACE RTMaps. This impressive reduction in file size highlights the efficiency and effectiveness of Beamr's technology in data compression for various applications.

data.title: VIA Agentic Solution Awarded IL5 Continuous Authority to Operate by United States Air Force
data.description: Enhanced authorization has boosted the adoption of VIA's eJARVIS (SLAM AI), speeding up essential results with secure data access and autonomous analysis. On April 20, 2026, in Boston, the Department of the Air Force (DAF) granted VIA Science, Inc. (VIA)...

data.title: In HelloNation, Winery Expert Lauren Rutherford of Lexington, KY, Highlights What to Know Before Your First Winery Tasting
data.description: In Lexington, Kentucky on April 20, 2026, a HelloNation article provides guidance for first-time winery visitors at Talon Winery. Lauren Rutherford shares insights to help individuals prepare for their first winery tasting experience. The article offers valuable tips and information to enhance visitors' understanding of the winery visit, assisting in making the experience enjoyable and educational.
